subcodes.first_line: O spiritual one! The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that, continuously and successively, thy mention hath been made before the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روحانی قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد که متتابعا متوالیا ذکرت لدی العرش مذکور و
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
